source: National Park Service — Wrangell-St. Elias National Park & Preserve
title: Malaspina Glacier
description: Aerial view of the medial moraines and flow-lines of Malaspina Glacier in Wrangell-St. Elias National Park — North America's largest piedmont glacier, adjacent to Hubbard and visible on the same cruise-day transit between the Gulf of Alaska and Yakutat Bay.
alt: Aerial view of Malaspina Glacier showing curving dark medial moraines on a piedmont ice lobe
